data = open\('DungeonDefendersGearOptimizer/DbSearchHelper.cs', 'rb'\).read\(\)
old = \(
    b'if \(value is int iv && iv >= 0 && maxDepth > 1\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(field.Name == \\"FamiliarDataIndex\\"\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tforeach \(var kv in BuildValueMap\(\(object\)db.GetHeroEquipment_Familiar\(iv\), db, maxDepth - 1, path\)\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmap[kv.Key] = kv.Value;\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\telse if \(CrossRefs.ContainsKey\(\(type, field.Name\)\)\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tvar refStruct = GetStructByIndexEntry\(db, iv\);\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(refStruct != null\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tforeach \(var kv in BuildValueMap\(refStruct, db, maxDepth - 1, path\)\)\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmap[kv.Key] = kv.Value;\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\r\\n'
    b'\\t\\t\\t\\t}'
\)
print\('found:', old in data\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
data = open\('E:/DDGO/DungeonDefendersGearOptimizer/DbSearchHelper.cs', 'rb'\).read\(\)

old = \(b'private bool ParseComparison\(object s\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring field = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring op = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring rhs = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tvar raw = DbSearchHelper.ResolveToRaw\(s, field, _db, _extraStruct\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\treturn Compare\(raw, op, rhs\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t}'\)

new = \(b'private bool ParseComparison\(object s\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring field = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring op = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tstring rhs = Next\(\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tint wi = field.IndexOf\(\\"[].\\", System.StringComparison.Ordinal\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tif \(wi >= 0\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\treturn MatchAnyArrayElement\(s, field[..wi], field[\(wi + 3\)..], op, rhs\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tvar raw = DbSearchHelper.ResolveToRaw\(s, field, _db, _extraStruct\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\treturn Compare\(raw, op, rhs\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t}\\r\\n'
       b'\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\tprivate bool MatchAnyArrayElement\(object s, string arrayField, string elemField, string op, string rhs\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tvar f = s.GetType\(\).GetField\(arrayField, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tif \(f == null\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\treturn _extraStruct != null && MatchAnyArrayElement\(_extraStruct, arrayField, elemField, op, rhs\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tif \(f.GetValue\(s\) is not Array_Data ad || ad.Count == 0\) return false;\\r\\n'
       b'\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\tfor \(int i = 0; i < ad.Count; i++\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\tobject? elem = null;\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(DbSearchHelper.IsDirectPoolArrayType\(ad.Type\)\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\telem = DbSearchHelper.GetDirectPoolStruct\(_db, ad.Type, ad.Start + i\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\telse if \(ad.Type != VarType.Float && ad.Type != VarType.String\)\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tvar span = _db.GetIntArrayElemsSpan\(ad.Start, ad.Count\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tint idx = span[i];\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(idx >= 0\) elem = DbSearchHelper.GetStructByIndexEntry\(_db, idx\);\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(elem == null\) continue;\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(Compare\(DbSearchHelper.ResolveToRaw\(elem, elemField, _db\), op, rhs\)\) return true;\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\t}\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t\\treturn false;\\r\\n'
       b'\\t\\t}'\)

out = data.replace\(old, new, 1\)
assert out != data, 'no change'
open\('E:/DDGO/DungeonDefendersGearOptimizer/DbSearchHelper.cs', 'wb'\).write\(out\)
print\('ok', len\(out\) - len\(data\), 'bytes added'\)
")
